About

Finance meets strategic ambition.

I'm Julen Beltran, a Business Management student from the University of the Basque Country (Spain), currently on an international exchange at Columbus State University in the United States.

I am focused on building a career in finance — whether in banking or within the financial department of a company. I'm particularly drawn to how firms make financial decisions, allocate capital, and manage performance over time.

Alongside my academic work, I follow financial markets closely and actively explore investing to deepen my understanding of risk, decision-making, and value creation in practice.

I bring a disciplined and consistent approach to everything I do — a mindset shaped by daily training and sports, and one that I carry directly into my work. I am currently looking for an opportunity to gain hands-on experience in a professional finance environment.

Analytical Consistent Disciplined Curious Long-term thinker Learns from mistakes

Education

Spain · Ongoing

Bachelor's in Business Management

University of the Basque Country (UPV/EHU) · Third Year

  • Financial Institutions and Markets

United States · Exchange Year

International Exchange Program

Columbus State University · Academic Year Abroad

  • Focus on finance and business strategy
  • Immersive English-language academic environment
  • Cross-cultural business perspective

Experience

Customer-Facing

Sales Experience

  • Approached 597 potential customers directly, achieving a 35.8% trial acceptance rate — 214 people agreed to try the product
  • Converted 8.4% of those who tried into buyers (18 sales), resulting in an overall conversion rate of 3% from cold approach to purchase
  • Developed communication and persuasion skills by learning to read customer responses, handle objections, and adapt pitch in real time
  • Built resilience and consistency through high-volume, results-oriented direct selling

Operations

Warehouse Experience

  • Cultivated discipline and a strong work ethic in a structured, fast-paced setting
  • Improved time management, attention to detail, and personal accountability
  • Gained firsthand appreciation for operational efficiency and team coordination

Current Projects & Interests

01

Machine Learning from Scratch

Working through Andrew Ng's specialisation to build a solid foundation in ML — with a clear focus on applying these tools to finance and investment analysis.

02

10-K Company Analysis

Applying academic finance knowledge to real-world cases — reading annual reports, calculating key ratios, and practising the kind of analysis used in equity research.

04 PDF ↗

Investment Portfolio — JP Beltran

Managed a $100,000 simulated portfolio from Jan–Apr 2026 as part of the Student Finance Association at Columbus State. Achieved a +6.75% return vs S&P 500 at −2.30%. Click to view the full portfolio summary report.

Mindset

Atomic Habits

James Clear

How small daily habits compound into remarkable results — and why systems matter more than goals.

02

Finance & Life

Principles

Ray Dalio

The core beliefs behind Bridgewater — radical truth, radical transparency, and idea meritocracy as a system for decision-making.

03

Investing

Buffettology

Mary Buffett & David Clark

How Warren Buffett selects businesses — the logic behind buying great companies at sensible prices and holding them long-term.

04

Business

Mi MBA Personal

Josh Kaufman

A self-directed guide to the most important business concepts — strategy, marketing, finance, and psychology.

Read my notes →

05

Mindset

El Hombre en Busca de Sentido

Viktor Frankl

A psychiatrist's account of surviving Nazi concentration camps — and what it taught him about meaning, freedom, and the human will to live.

06

Strategy

The Art of War

Sun Tzu

Ancient strategic principles — about positioning, adaptability, and knowing when to act and when to wait.

Read my notes →

07

Behavioural Science

The Undoing Project

Michael Lewis

The story of Kahneman and Tversky — whose work on human judgment changed economics, medicine, and finance forever.
